info.title: Circle K Hackathon API
info.description: REST API over a synthetic Circle K Norge dataset. Each deployed instance has its own mutable copy of the data — feel free to create, update, and delete records. Use POST /api/admin/reset to restore the original seed.

tags.name: stations
tags.description: Physical Circle K stations across Norway

get.description: Physical Circle K stations across Norway. Filter by any top-level scalar field as a query parameter (e.g. ?city=Oslo). Use ?q= for substring search across all fields.

post.description: If station_id is omitted, the server generates one.

get.summary: Get one stations item by station_id

get.description: Loyalty programme members. Filter by any top-level scalar field as a query parameter (e.g. ?city=Oslo). Use ?q= for substring search across all fields.

post.description: If member_id is omitted, the server generates one.

get.summary: Get one loyalty_members item by member_id

get.description: Weather observations per station. Filter by any top-level scalar field as a query parameter (e.g. ?city=Oslo). Use ?q= for substring search across all fields.
